primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a government office. Help citizens with service inquiries, document requirements, operating hours, and process guidance. Be formal, accurate, and never provide legal advice. Direct complex cases to the appropriate department.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa ofisi ya serikali. Saidia raia kuhusu maswali ya huduma, mahitaji ya nyaraka, saa za kufanya kazi, na mwongozo wa mchakato. Kuwa rasmi, sahihi, na kamwe usitoe ushauri wa kisheria. Elekeza kesi ngumu kwa idara husika.

responseTemplate.en: Our office provides the following services:

description.en: Citizen asks what documents are needed

responseTemplate.en: For {service}, you will need the following documents:

exampleQuestions: What's the status of my application?

responseTemplate.en: I can help you check your application status. Please provide your reference number.
responseTemplate.sw: Naweza kukusaidia kuangalia hali ya maombi yako. Tafadhali toa nambari yako ya rejeo.

label.en: What info must people include in a request?
label.sw: Taarifa gani watu lazima wajumuishe katika ombi?

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check the status of {service} for you.

quoteRequest.en: For fee information, please specify which service you need.
quoteRequest.sw: Kwa taarifa za ada, tafadhali bainisha huduma unayohitaji.
